project.name: gwc
project.description: Governance and workflow management codebase — an internal multi-agent SDLC platform with Jira/Confluence sync, DS MCP integration, Supabase persistence, and Vercel deployment.

edges.description: Runbook index explicitly lists the canonical G0/G1 operational runbook.
The operational runbook states that it operationalizes this governance contract.
The operational runbook states that it operationalizes this gate lifecycle contract.
The runbook explicitly resolves gate outcomes through the transition map.
The fastlane runbook explicitly references the canonical governance contract.
The fastlane runbook explicitly references the gate lifecycle contract.
The upgrade runbook explicitly references the canonical governance contract.
The upgrade runbook explicitly references the gate lifecycle contract.
The rescue document explicitly proposes clarifications to this lifecycle contract.
